top_stories.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
top_stories.insight: This indicates a potential shift in monetary policy, affecting interest rates and the overall economy.

top_stories.title: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
top_stories.insight: The lack of a clear rate forecast and potential hike in 2026 creates uncertainty for investors and the market.

top_stories.title: Fed holds rates steady, pares down statement to remove cutting bias
top_stories.insight: This decision suggests the Fed is taking a more cautious approach to monetary policy, which may impact economic growth.

top_stories.title: Gold Set for Weekly Loss on Hawkish Fed and Peace Deal Jitters
top_stories.insight: The hawkish Fed stance and peace deal concerns are affecting gold prices, which can be an indicator of market sentiment.

top_stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
top_stories.insight: The AI rout and its impact on stocks demonstrate the growing influence of technology on the market.

daily_summary: The financial market is experiencing a shift due to the new Fed Chair Warsh's hawkish stance, with potential implications for interest rates, economic growth, and investor sentiment. The market is also reacting to other factors such as the AI rout and peace deal concerns.
